promotion.note: Owner exercised the human-held promotion after keel admitted the proof. Prod now serves this exact proven candidate.

coverage.what-this-dogfood-proves: source content-address (digest) + ed25519 signed admission proof bound to it + real dark-slot deploy + both routes served 200 carrying the digest. Verified by experiments/dogfood/gate.mjs against a pinned key.
coverage.served-ref-cas: the promote/CAS feature-gate flip is exercised by src/napkin.test.ts (local file-backed), NOT end-to-end in this dogfood run; prod promotion is the owner-held keel step.
coverage.digest-scope: the digest is a content address of the SOURCE tree, not a hash of the deployed Worker bytes (the page embeds its own signed receipt and cannot hash itself).
